phrases.intent_en: Ask where the archaeology section is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la sección de arqueología?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah sek-SYOHN deh ahr-keh-oh-loh-HEE-ah?

likely_response.local: Suba al primer piso, junto al Patio de
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH
likely_response.translation_en: First floor, at the back on the right.

responses.english: First floor, at the back on the right.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH
responses.french: Suba al primer piso, junto al Patio de

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fine arts gallery is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme la sala de bellas artes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh lah SAH-lah deh BEH-yahs AHR-tehs?

likely_response.local: Suba al segundo piso, junto al Patio de
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Second floor, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH
responses.french: Suba al segundo piso, junto al Patio de

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la exposición temporal?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh en-koo-EN-trah lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN tem-poh-RAHL?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get an audio guide
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger una audioguía?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR OO-nah ow-dee-oh-GHEE-ah?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, justo al entrar.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, right upon entering.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, right upon entering.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
responses.french: En la taquilla principal, justo al entrar.
